title: New 'Sheesh Mahal' Row In Jharkhand? Hemant Soren's Rs 67 Crore Bungalow Under BJP Scanner
description: Estimated at a cost of Rs 67 crore, Hemant Soren's bungalow has been labelled by the BJP, which is in opposition in the state, as a waste of public money. However the Jharkhand Mukti Morcha, or JMM, defended it as an essential infrastructure project related to administration and security.
